animals.name: Hancock
animals.notes: Har choti choti baton pe

animals.name: Murphy
animals.notes: An affectionate retriever who loves fetch and evening walks. Murphy was found near a market road with a leg injury. After treatment and rehab, he is now healthy and eager to join a loving family.

animals.name: Luna
animals.notes: A calm indoor cat who enjoys window naps and soft toys. Luna was surrendered when her previous owner moved overseas. She adjusted quickly in foster care and now seeks a stable forever home.

animals.name: Scout & Jem
animals.notes: Young bonded brothers with endless energy and curiosity. The brothers were rescued from a construction site and raised together in our center. They are deeply bonded and should be adopted together.

animals.name: Balthazar
animals.notes: A gentle giant who enjoys relaxed routines and space. Balthazar was rescued after being abandoned at a highway stop. He has completed obedience training and is now adoption-ready.

animals.name: Rio
animals.notes: A stunning macaw who needs enrichment and social attention. Rio came from an illegal private sale and required careful rehabilitation. He now thrives with daily interaction and structured enrichment.

animals.name: Oliver
animals.notes: A lively kitten who loves climbing and chasing toys. Oliver was found alone during monsoon season and bottle-fed by our neonatal team. He is now healthy and fully weaned.

animals.name: Hazel
animals.notes: A sweet lab mix who responds well to commands. Hazel was brought in after a minor road accident. She recovered quickly and now enjoys group play sessions every day.

animals.name: Milo
animals.notes: A smart indie dog who settles well indoors. Milo was rescued during a storm and treated for skin infection. He has fully recovered and thrives in foster routines.

animals.name: Pepper
animals.notes: A soft-natured cat who likes calm corners and cuddles. Pepper was rescued from a warehouse colony during a relocation drive. She is now healthy and confidently socializing.

animals.name: Koda
animals.notes: A high-energy companion who loves runs and puzzles. Koda was relinquished due to relocation and high activity needs. He now follows a structured enrichment and training plan.

animals.name: Nori
animals.notes: A bright parakeet who bonds through routine care. Nori was confiscated from cramped housing and rehabilitated with flight exercise. She now needs a spacious, stimulating environment.

animals.name: Coco
animals.notes: A confident calico with a playful personality. Coco was rescued as a kitten with mild malnutrition. She has regained full health and enjoys interactive toys.

animals.name: Bruno
animals.notes: A calm street-survivor who now loves gentle routines. Bruno recovered from dehydration and now volunteers often use him in socialization walks because of his stable temperament.

animals.name: Zara
animals.notes: A sharp and loyal companion with strong recall skills. Zara was surrendered due to housing restrictions. She has completed advanced obedience and enjoys agility tasks.

animals.name: Toffee
animals.notes: A cheerful beagle mix who loves scent games. Toffee was rescued from a breeder closure and gradually learned home routines in foster care.

animals.name: Simba
animals.notes: A young pup with lots of potential and warmth. Simba was rescued from a drainage canal and has made a full recovery under neonatal and behavioral care.

animals.name: Daisy
animals.notes: A gentle spaniel mix who bonds deeply with her people. Daisy was surrendered after her owner developed medical issues. She is healthy and emotionally steady.

animals.name: Leo
animals.notes: A mature lab with excellent home manners. Leo was found wandering with an old collar tag. After recovery and assessment, he proved to be calm and people-focused.

animals.name: Whiskers
animals.notes: A fluffy companion who enjoys gentle attention. Whiskers came from an overcrowded apartment surrender and now enjoys consistent grooming and indoor play.

animals.name: Mittens
animals.notes: A lively kitten with bright curiosity and confidence. Mittens was rescued from a parking basement and moved to foster care where she quickly adapted to home life.

animals.name: Mocha
animals.notes: An expressive cat who thrives on interaction. Mocha was rescued from a closed pet shop and has blossomed with regular play and social handling.

animals.name: Cleo
animals.notes: An independent but affectionate cat with soft manners. Cleo was rescued from a warehouse colony and now enjoys stable indoor routines with occasional play bursts.

animals.name: Figaro
animals.notes: A balanced tabby who adjusts well to new spaces. Figaro was surrendered when his family relocated abroad. He has been thriving in foster care and is now ready for adoption.

animals.name: Sky
animals.notes: A bright cockatiel who enjoys gentle training. Sky was rescued from unsafe caging conditions and regained full feather health with proper nutrition and flight time.

animals.name: Kiwi
animals.notes: A colorful lovebird with playful social energy. Kiwi was rescued after an accidental release and treated for mild wing strain. He now flies confidently and seeks a safe home.

animals.name: Amber
animals.notes: A highly intelligent ringneck that needs patient bonding. Amber was rescued from a neglect case and underwent behavioral rehabilitation. She now accepts structured social sessions.

animals.name: Pico
animals.notes: A lively budgie that enjoys human interaction. Pico was surrendered when his owner moved. He remains healthy and active with daily enrichment sessions.

animals.name: Mango
animals.notes: A social conure who loves interactive toys and music. Mango was rehabilitated after feather damage and now follows a healthy routine with supervised flight and play.

animals.name: Max
animals.notes: A disciplined companion with strong loyalty. Max was surrendered for financial reasons and was already obedience-trained. He is healthy and adoption-ready.

animals.name: Ginger
animals.notes: A sunny personality with a love for toy mice. Ginger was rescued during a colony sterilization drive and quickly became a favorite in foster care.

animals.name: Pluto
animals.notes: A gentle adult dog with excellent house manners. Pluto was rescued with a minor paw injury and has recovered fully. He adapts well to quiet homes.

animals.name: Ivy
animals.notes: A curious young cat who enjoys climbing trees and shelves. Ivy was rescued from a residential parking lot and has become confident through gradual socialization.

animals.name: Rocky
animals.notes: A playful boxer mix with great social confidence. Rocky was found near an industrial area and recovered from mild malnutrition. He now enjoys agility games.

animals.name: Pearl
animals.notes: A calm cockatiel that responds to patient handling. Pearl was surrendered from a household unable to continue care. She is healthy and settled in foster care.

animals.name: Tango
animals.notes: A social lovebird with strong pair-bonding behavior. Tango came from an overcrowded aviary and has been rehabilitated with enrichment and monitored socialization.
